老系统改造,新老两边的输出如果不能用工具自动 diff,就只能 靠人盯。靠人盯一定会漏。

title: 美国又整活儿了！这次特朗普看上的是座印度洋小岛 | 原文
content: The US is reportedly attempting to purchase the entire Chagos Archipelago, including Diego Garcia island—site of a secretive American military base—from Mauritius for billions of dollars, bypassing ally Britain. The move follows a March incident where Iranian missiles landed near the island, shocking the Pentagon. The British Daily Telegraph broke the news on June 7.

title: 8 年重构踩坑的领悟：渐进式改造
content: Over eight years, the author completed four successful system rewrites—order migration, Redis refactoring, SOA transformation, and master data consolidation—using gradual replacement rather than rebuilding. The approach involves slicing changes into weekly chunks, running old and new systems in parallel with comparison tools, and prioritizing rollback switches. Each project took 1–2 years with fine-grained gray releases. However, this fails when business requirements change rapidly, forcing dual maintenance and extended risk windows; direct cutover then works better. The core principle: prioritize reversibility over initial correctness.
eventKey: 年重构踩坑的领悟-渐进式改造
normalizedTitle: 8 年重构踩坑的领悟 渐进式改造

title: 被公安请去喝茶了，刚回到家，提醒一下大家注意安全
content: A person was summoned to a local police station after a stranger called requesting their presence. Officers informed them that a company website allegedly hosted pornographic content. The individual clarified that the domain had not been used since 2019, though it remained registered under their company's name. After submitting documentation proving no involvement, they received official notices and informational materials before departing. The key lesson: cancel domain registrations for unused domains to avoid similar complications.

title: 苹果押注“廉价 AI”，低于 200 万次下载的独立开发者可免费使用云端模型
content: 苹果正试图用一种更“柔和”的方式撬开独立开发者市场。在本周全球开发者大会（WWDC）的开发者主题演讲中，苹果宣布了一项针对小开发者的激励计划：累计首次下载量低于200万次的开发者，可以免费使用苹果的Foundation Models运行在Private Cloud…

title: 受AI需求推动，中国5月出口加速增长；对美出口激增
content: China's exports grew 19.4% year-on-year in May, driven by AI-related demand, while imports rose 27.4%. Exports to the United States surged 35.4%.

title: 阿里巴巴升级大模型组织架构 成立 Token Foundry 事业部
content: Alibaba merged its Tongyi large-model division and Future Life Lab into a new Token Foundry unit, led directly by CEO Wu Yongming. The reorganization affects multiple AI businesses. Zhou Jingren becomes chief scientist and will head a new AI Future Research Institute focused on frontier AI exploration. Zheng Bo and teams including Happy Horse and Happy Oyster join Token Foundry.

title: 字节 Seed 相关人士回应顾全全离职传闻：并非 AI 制药及预训练负责人
content: ByteDance Seed clarified that Gu Quanquan, rumored to have left to start a business, was not the head of AI drug discovery or LLM pretraining. title: 苹果推出 Siri AI，有独立 App
content: Apple unveiled Siri AI at WWDC26 on June 9, featuring enhanced conversational abilities, customizable voice settings, system-wide integration, screen reading, and app interaction. It launches as a standalone app with Dynamic Island optimization. Compatible with iPhone 15 Pro, 16, and later models, plus iPadOS, watchOS, and visionOS with a 3D crystal sphere interface. Initial English support will expand quickly. Visual Intelligence extends to Mac.

title: 美团接入微信 AI 生态，未来提供外卖等 AI 生活服务体验
content: WeChat is opening its AI ecosystem to developers in beta testing. Meituan is among the first partners, enabling users to access food delivery and local services through WeChat's AI Agent. Trip.com has also announced integration for hotel bookings, with JD.com reportedly joining as well. Meituan has been developing its own AI assistants, including "Xiaomei" and "Xiaotuan," as it aims to become an AI gateway for local life services.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 金融界

title: 钉钉副总裁、AI 产品负责人马锐拉宣布离职
content: DingTalk Vice President and AI product lead Ma Ruila (real name Wang Jiamin) completed his resignation on May 15, ending a three-year tenure at Alibaba. He founded Wolai, a collaborative office platform acquired by DingTalk in 2023, where he led intelligent document and personal edition product development. Ma previously founded Chinese music portal Music Sky, film database Mtime predecessor, and real estate site Wolai Fangchan. His departure follows DingTalk CEO Ye Jun's exit in July 2024.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 虎嗅网
